title: Fantasy Ores by CesarZorak
description: Bring more happiness to classic Minecraft ores!
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/HyVpPan.png)


# ABOUT:

Fantasy Ores improves vanilla minecraft ores, making for a better experience.
Inspired by Hytale, but with my personal style.


# FEATURES:

* 3D ores.
* 3D Obsidian and crying.
* 3D Amethyst cluster.

If you want to disable the "shiny ores" delete the "optifine" folder inside the zip file.
Mod support, click here:: Fantasy Ores Modded ❤

![IMPORTAT](https://i.imgur.com/EjFOwtq.png)
